summary: Completed testing of Multi-LLM AI Agent integration. All backend endpoints working (100% pass - 14/14 tests). Frontend UI verified - model selector dropdown shows all 4 options (GPT-5.2 Reasoning, Gemini 3 Flash Fast, Claude 4.5 Analysis, Auto Smart Select), voice recording button present with mic icon.

details: Returns 3 LLMs: gpt-5.2, gemini-3-flash, claude-sonnet-4.5
Each LLM has provider, model, description, best_for, speed, cost, max_tokens
GPT-5.2: provider=openai, speed=medium, cost=high, best_for=[complex_analysis, reasoning]
Gemini 3 Flash: provider=gemini, speed=fast, cost=low, best_for=[quick_responses, simple_queries]
Claude Sonnet 4.5: provider=anthropic, speed=medium, cost=medium, best_for=[detailed_analysis, document_processing]
default=gpt-5.2, auto_selection=True
Accepts context.model parameter for GPT-5.2
Accepts context.model parameter for Gemini 3 Flash
Accepts context.model parameter for Claude Sonnet 4.5
Returns success with message, data, reasoning, actions_taken, suggestions
Endpoint accepts preferred_model form parameter
Accepts agent_type parameter (business, assistant, operations, analytics)
Accepts conversation_id parameter for multi-turn conversations

features_tested.feature: Model Selection UI on AI Agent Page
details: Found model selector dropdown with data-testid='llm-model-selector'
Dropdown shows 4 options: GPT-5.2 (Reasoning), Gemini 3 Flash (Fast), Claude 4.5 (Analysis), Auto (Smart Select)
Default selection is GPT-5.2

features_tested.feature: Voice Recording Button on AI Agent Page
details: Found voice button with data-testid='voice-record-btn'
Button has mic icon (SVG)
Located next to chat input
sendVoiceMessage function includes preferred_model parameter
POST /api/ai-agents/analytics/process - works with model context
POST /api/ai-agents/assistant/process - works with model context
GET /api/ai-agents/available - returns 4 agents (business, assistant, operations, analytics)
Endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)

critical_code_review_comments: AVAILABLE_LLMS dictionary in emergent_agents.py correctly defines 3 LLMs with proper configurations
select_best_llm_for_task function uses keyword analysis to auto-select appropriate model
_process_with_llm method supports preferred_model parameter and falls back through models on failure
Voice endpoint at /api/ai-agents/voice/process correctly accepts preferred_model form parameter
Frontend AIAgentPage.js model selector has proper data-testid attributes for testing
sendVoiceMessage function correctly passes selectedModel to backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-LLM integration fully tested. Available LLMs: gpt-5.2 (complex reasoning), gemini-3-flash (quick responses), claude-sonnet-4.5 (detailed analysis). Model selector UI on AI Agent page has data-testid='llm-model-selector'. Voice button has data-testid='voice-record-btn'. Backend endpoints: /api/ai-agents/available-llms, /api/ai-agents/{type}/process, /api/ai-agents/voice/process.
